page_0278.png: Styles management panel showing Standard_Style listed as the default style card, with add, delete, and vertical ellipsis (import/export options) buttons in the top action bar
page_0279_0.png: Application Manager showing a partial view of application entries with plus and minus buttons, and an open context menu with Import and Export all options for managing InTouch application style cards
page_0279_1.png: Style Manager with HPHMI and Metal style cards listed, HPHMI selected with Quality & Status and HMI Element tabs, and a right-click context menu showing Make default, Rename (F2), Duplicate (Ctrl+D), Delete, and Export options
